name: feature-grid-01
title: Feature Grid 01 — heading + card grid
description: Layout section, ships populated: centered heading block above a 3/4-column card grid (columns prop). Swap the demo Cards for your own cells; customise by editing the installed copy.

files.content:
--- /** * FeatureGrid-01.astro -- layout section: centered heading block above a * 3/4-column card grid. Ships populated (frontend-contract.md §7): * renders a complete block; make it yours by editing * this copy you own (swap the Cards for your own cells). * * `columns` picks the lg+ column count; below lg the grid steps down to * 2 then 1. Ships three demo cards -- add a fourth when columns={4}. */ import { cn } from "../../../lib/utils"; import Card from "../Card.astro"; interface Props { /** lg+ column count for the items grid. */ columns?: 3 | 4; class?: string; [key: string]: unknown; } const { columns = 3, class: className, ...rest } = Astro.props; ---

Why teams pick this stack

Three to four cells of proof. Keep each one to a claim and a sentence.
